title: Manu Maʻu
description: New Zealand and Tonga international rugby league footballer
extract:
Manu Maʻu (born 24 August 1988) is a rugby league footballer who plays as a second-row forward for the Souths Sharks in Mackay, Queensland. He has played for both Tonga and New Zealand at international level.
He previously played for the Parramatta Eels in the NRL and Hull FC in the Super League.
